result.reason: New feature request to import .moba files from MobaXTerm, extending existing connection import functionality.
result.approach: Implement a new IConnectionImporter<string> for MobaXTerm's .moba file format and integrate it into the existing connection import mechanism within mRemoteNG/App/Import.cs.
